a.xlink:title: Adds another coupling scheme in parallel to this scheme.
Initializes the coupling scheme and establishes a communication connection to the coupling partner...
Returns true, if initialize has been called.
Getter for _sendsInitializedData.
Getter for _receivesInitializedData.
Initializes the data for first implicit coupling scheme iteration.
Adds newly computed time. Has to be called before every advance.
Exchanges data and updates the state of the coupling scheme.
Finalizes the coupling and disconnects communication.
Returns list of all coupling partners.
Returns true, if data will be exchanged when calling advance().
Returns true, if data has been exchanged in last call of advance().
Returns the currently computed time of the coupling scheme.
Returns the currently computed time windows of the coupling scheme.
Returns true, if timestep length is prescribed by the cpl scheme.
Returns the timestep length, if one is given by the coupling scheme.
Returns the remaining timestep length inside the current time window.
Returns the maximal length of the next timestep to be computed.
Returns true, when the coupled simulation is still ongoing.
Returns true, when the accessor can advance to the next time window.
Returns true, if the given action has to be performed by the accessor.
Tells the coupling scheme that the accessor has performed the given action.
Sets an action required to be performed by the accessor.
Returns a string representation of the current coupling state.
Determines the current set of active coupling schemes.
Advances the active set of coupling schemes.
